product.name: ArGiyim Sultan
product.categorySourceGroup: Ultra Durable, Ultra Breathable Front Side Polyester Back Side Cotton, PolyCotton Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: 49% Polyester 50% Cotton 1% Carbon PolyCotton High Visible, Flame Retardant, Chemical Resistant, Antistatic Satin Fabric
product.specLine: 330 g/m², 49% Polyester 50% Cotton 1% Carbon High Visible, Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Chemical Resistant, 4/1 Satin Woven Fabric
descriptions: 49% Polyester 50% Cotton 1% Carbon PolyCotton High visible, Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Chemical resistant satin fabric. The front side of the fabric is 100% Polyester which is ultra durable for work conditions and light, the back side of the fabric is cotton which provides breathability to the user.
ArGiyim²45 are used for outdoor jackets, safety jackets, pans and trousers.
Certified for EN ISO 20471, EN 11612, EN 1149-5, EN 61482 and EN 13034.
49% Polyester 50% Cotton 1% Carbon PolyCotton High Visible, Flame Retardant, Chemical Resistant, Antistatic Satin Fabric
330 g/m², 49% Polyester 50% Cotton 1% Carbon High Visible, Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Chemical Resistant, 4/1 Satin Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 49% Polyester (PES) 50% Cotton (CO) 1% Carbon (CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp > 2000N ; Weft > 800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 35N ; Weft > 30N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Heat and Flame Protection | Done | EN ISO 11612

acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit EN ISO 20471 certification and repeated 'High Visible' designation, with stated application as Hi Vis Pans, directly supports high-visibility apparel use.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Explicit certified electric-arc protection (EN 61482 Class 1) combined with antistatic certification directly supports electrical/high-voltage protective use relevant to the energy sector.
EN ISO 11612 heat and flame protection is certified but no explicit firefighter turnout gear or fire brigade use is stated.
Chemical resistance and FR properties are present but no explicit welding, foundry or metal-splash use is stated.

evidence: Description: used for outdoor jackets, safety jackets, pans and trousers
primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471 and consistently labeled 'High Visible' across title, spec line and technical parameters, with a stated application of 'Hi Vis Pans' for safety jackets and trousers, making high-visibility apparel the clear dominant end use.

evidence: EN ISO 11612 heat and flame protection
Description: used for outdoor jackets, safety jackets, pans and trousers
secondary.rationale: The fabric combines multiple general industrial protective certifications (FR, antistatic, arc, chemical) intended for broad protective workwear garments (jackets, pans, trousers) beyond just the hi-vis certification, supporting a secondary general industrial workwear use.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Arc protection and antistatic certifications are present but no explicit electrical-utility or high-voltage sector use is stated; property alone is insufficient per rules.
No explicit welding, foundry or metal-splash use stated despite FR and chemical resistance.
EN ISO 11612 present but no explicit firefighter turnout gear use stated.
